2604.09886.title: Not Your Stereo-Typical Estimator: Combining Vision and Language for Volume Perception
2604.09886.paper_summary: Accurate volume estimation of objects from visual data is a long-standing challenge in computer vision with significant applications in robotics, logistics, and smart health. Existing methods often rely on complex 3D reconstruction pipelines or struggle with the ambiguity inherent in single-view images. To address these limitations, we introduce a new method that fuses implicit 3D cues from stereo vision with explicit prior knowledge from natural language text. Our approach extracts deep features from a stereo image pair and a descriptive text prompt that contains the object's class and an approximate volume, then integrates them using a simple yet effective projection layer into a unified, multi-modal representation for regression. We conduct extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrating that our text-guided approach significantly outperforms vision-only baselines. Our findings show that leveraging even simple textual priors can effectively guide the volume estimation task, paving the way for more context-aware visual measurement systems. Code: https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/stereo-typical-estimator.
2604.09886.paper_summary_zh: 從視覺數據準確估算物體體積一直是計算機視覺中的一個長期挑戰，並在機器人技術、物流和智能健康等領域具有重要應用。現有的方法通常依賴於複雜的三維重建流程，或者在單視圖圖像中掙扎於固有的模糊性。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了一種新方法，將來自立體視覺的隱含三維線索與來自自然語言文本的明確先驗知識相融合。我們的方法從一對立體圖像和包含物體類別及近似體積的描述性文本提示中提取深層特徵，然後使用一個簡單而有效的投影層將它們整合成統一的多模態表示以進行回歸。我們在公共數據集上進行了廣泛的實驗，證明我們的文本引導方法顯著超越了僅依賴視覺的基準。我們的研究結果顯示，即使是利用簡單的文本先驗也能有效指導體積估算任務，為更具上下文感知的視覺測量系統鋪平道路。代碼：https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/stereo-typical-estimator。
2604.09886.author: Gautham Vinod et.al.
2604.09886.authors: Gautham Vinod, Bruce Coburn, Siddeshwar Raghavan, Fengqing Zhu
